message:
feat: CASS integration module + accounts refactor + build metadata improvements

crates/wa-core/src/cass.rs (171 new lines):
- Expand cross-agent session search integration with additional
  query methods and response parsing

crates/wa-core/src/accounts.rs:
- Refactor account management for cleaner API surface

crates/wa-core/src/workflows.rs:
- Simplify workflow definitions, removing redundant branches

crates/wa/build.rs:
- Refine compile-time metadata capture

crates/wa/src/main.rs:
- Extend CLI with additional subcommand options

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
